description: Composition Teal round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print The stylish print on the front makes this T-shirt from jealous 21 a true piece of art while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or bermudas and chill out in style. Model statistics The product is a size L on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
